text: These instruments are used in video assisted thoracic surgeries that are performed with one opening or port.
Some of the instruments used in this type of surgery are forester forceps, the mixture dissector, node grasping forceps,
viper forceps, MIS-VATS hybrid instruments such as the MIS right angle dissector, double angle dissector, and node grasping forceps, as well as clamps, needle holders, and scissors.
Some of the benefits of uniport bats is that there is less thoracic invasiveness reduces post operative pulmonary complications pain and hospital stay.
